name: @industrysignal/connectors-fr
description: France data-source connectors. Implements the CountryConnector contract (HANDOFF §14) on free official sources: recherche-entreprises (companies + public dirigeants), BODACC (insolvency), BOAMP/TED (tenders), Eurostat Comext (trade flows). SIREN is the canonical entity id. No paid APIs.
